title: E-commerce Product Price Toggle

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Price Toggle

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g id='Page-1' fill='none' fill-rule='evenodd' transform='translate(0 100)'>
  <rect id='Artboard' x='0' y='0' width='400' height='200' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <rect id='Card' x='25' y='25' width='350' height='150' rx='10' fill='#F7F7F7'/>
  <rect id='Card-Shadow' x='26' y='26' width='348' height='148' rx='10' fill='#C06C88' opacity='.5'/>
  <text id='Product-Name' font-family='Helvetica' font-size='28' font-weight='bold' fill='#411C56' transform='translate(180 50)'>Product Name</text>
  <text id='Regular-Price' font-family='Helvetica' font-size='18' fill='#A8A8A8' transform='translate(180 110)'>Regular Price: $19.99</text>
  <text id='Sale-Price' font-family='Helvetica' font-size='18' fill='#A8A8A8' transform='translate(180 130)'>Sale Price: $9.99</text>
  <rect id='Toggle-Button' x='260' y='25' width='80' height='30' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text id='Toggle-Button-Text' font-family='Helvetica' font-size='12' font-weight='bold' fill='#F7F7F7' transform='translate(285 40)'>Apply Discount</text>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use the provided design mockup as a reference.
Must toggle the sale price when the toggle button is clicked.
Must be fully interactive with state updates.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Price Toggle

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify the toggle button changes the sale price when clicked and that the product information is centered within the card.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
